title.en: Wanderlust Explorer with React and Next.js
title.es: Wanderlust Explorer con React y Next.js

description.en: Build a multi-page Next.js app to explore travel experiences with URL-driven search and filters, dynamic routes, and favorites managed with React state.
description.es: Construye una app multipagina en Next.js para explorar experiencias de viaje con busqueda y filtros en la URL, rutas dinamicas y favoritos gestionados con estado de React.

sharing.en: I just completed Wanderlust Explorer with React and Next.js with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/nextjs-wanderlust-explorer #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #nextjs #react #typescript
sharing.es: Acabo de completar Wanderlust Explorer con React y Next.js con LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Mira el proyecto: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/nextjs-wanderlust-explorer #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #nextjs #react #typescript

sharing.en: Built and shipped: Wanderlust Explorer with React and Next.js. Learning by building with @4GeeksAcademy. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/nextjs-wanderlust-explorer #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #nextjs #react #typescript
